hero.kicker: Open Identity for Homelabs and NGOs
hero.title: Secure identity for every self-hosted service.
hero.subtitle: Janus is the authentication layer for homelab operators and mission-driven NGOs. Centralize sign-in, enforce MFA, and keep control of your users and data without vendor lock-in.

data.title: Built for trusted access in community infrastructure.
whatWeKeepList: Only the identity fields you choose to collect (email, profile, role)
Authentication logs for security and audit trails
Consent and access records for accountability
whereStoredList: Encrypted at rest and in transit
whoHasAccessList: You: full access to your data
Janus support: only when explicitly requested
No resale, no ad targeting, no surveillance business model

auth.title: Authentication flow
auth.subtitle: Rare by design.
auth.step1: You click sign-in on a service

useCases.title: Use cases: homelab and NGO teams
useCases.subtitle: Janus lets your developers delegate authentication and focus on product delivery while we handle the difficult identity infrastructure work.

cards.title: Homelab operators
cards.description: Run a single trusted login across your self-hosted tools without rebuilding auth for every service.
points: Centralized sign-in for dashboards, apps, and admin tools
MFA and account protection without custom security plumbing
Storage and identity lifecycle handled with a clean integration path

cards.title: NGOs and mission-driven organizations
cards.description: Protect volunteers, staff, and partner access while keeping operational overhead low.
points: Role-ready identity foundation for team and partner access
Audit-friendly authentication logs and consent records
Privacy-first defaults that support responsible data stewardship

promisePoints: Secure storage strategy, token/session handling, and encryption practices
Authentication security controls, MFA flows, and ongoing hardening
A developer-friendly interface so apps can simply delegate authentication to Janus

mfaMethods.title: MFA methods
mfaMethods.subtitle: Janus requires at least two secure second-factor options and supports the following methods.

strongPassword10Words.part1: Good old strong password with 10 words (as recommended by the NIST in

services.title: Connect to the services you use

vision.title: What we hope to achieve
vision.subtitle: The long-term goals for Janus as a neutral, citizen-friendly identity provider.

security: Mask or proxy your email identity to reduce cross-site correlation if an app database is breached.
Apply GeoIP to detect abnormal new connections.
Get audited for GDPR, SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, NIS 2, HDS, and SecNumCloud 3.2.
features: Use your FranceConnect account as a gateway for other apps.
Offer address, identity and student status verification.
Offer a portal for users to see where their identity is being used and which app uses which data.
Send emails when new connections are created.
Offer a subscription package and make it purchasable through works council benefits.
Package the subscription with out-of-the-box applications to replace GAFAM tools (for example, a Drive alternative, Google Photos).
developers: Allow developers to create new apps with public credentials to use Janus through OIDC.
recognition: Become a recognized identity provider like GitHub, Google, and Facebook on the web.
finances: Get funded through user generosity and donations.
infrastructure: Achieve robust multi-region, multi-cloud replication, backup, and disaster recovery with appropriate RPO and RTO targets.

community.title: Built for the community
community.subtitle: These integrations use Janus to provide a better experience for users.
community.devSubtitle: Learn how to integrate Janus identity into your app.

totp.title: TOTP app recommendations
totp.subtitle: Use an authenticator app for 2FA. We are not affiliated with these apps.

map.tagline: Infrastructure and data practices aligned with EU residency, policy, and digital autonomy expectations.

pricing.title: Subscription & funding
pricing.subtitle: Free for individuals and small homelabs. Optional paid plans help NGOs and teams scale securely while funding sustainable development.
freeFeatures: Manage and revoke your app connections
Portal to see which apps use which of your data
Email alerts when new connections are created
Use your identity with out-of-the-box alternative apps (Drive, Photos, etc.) as they launch
pricing.paidFor: For NGOs and organizations that need advanced controls and want to fund Janus
paidFeatures: Fund Janus through a privacy-respecting subscription
Subscription purchasable via works council benefits where available
Priority access to new out-of-the-box applications (Drive, Photos, etc.)
pricing.stickerNote: Paid customers receive a cool Janus sticker—we'll mail it to you.
